name: Ma Tie
page_title: Ma Tie 馬鐵 [Wei, Ma Teng] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Ma Tie was a son of Ma Teng. He accompanied his father to Ye city when Ma Teng was persuaded to take up rank there. Though granted a rank himself, he was executed alongside his father when Ma Chao later revolted.

A Biographical Dictionary of the Later-Han to Three Kingdoms by Dr. Rafe de Crespigny

full_text:
Ma Tie 馬鐵
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Tie (馬鐵)was born in Longxi. Killed in a volley of arrows as Cao Cao attacks the Ma’s outside Xuchang. Ma Tie was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and Ma Teng. Ma Tie lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
